movie.overview: Daigo, a cellist, is laid off from his orchestra and moves with his wife back to his small hometown where the living is cheaper. Thinking he’s applying for a job at a travel agency he finds he’s being interviewed for work with departures of a more permanent nature – as an undertaker’s assistant.
movie.title: Departures

cast.name: Arisa Ishikawa
cast.character: High School Girl on the Bus
